name: High-Protein Muscle Builder
description: Optimal nutritional split for muscle building, muscle recovery, and energy during intense lifting.

meals.breakfast: Egg white omelet with spinach, turkey breast, and whole wheat toast.
meals.lunch: Grilled chicken breast with brown rice, broccoli, and light olive oil.
meals.dinner: Baked salmon fillet with sweet potato mash and roasted asparagus.
meals.snacks: Whey protein shake, a handful of almonds, and Greek yogurt.

name: Balanced Weight-Loss Plan
description: Caloric deficit diet rich in fiber and lean protein to sustain fullness while shedding fat.

meals.breakfast: Oatmeal cooked with almond milk, topped with chia seeds and blueberries.
meals.lunch: Mixed green salad with grilled shrimp, avocado, cucumber, and vinaigrette.
meals.dinner: Stir-fried tofu with green beans, bell peppers, and quinoa.
meals.snacks: Apple slices with peanut butter, and cucumber sticks.

name: Plant-Powered Vegan Plan
description: Full plant-based nutritional plan prioritizing complex carbs, healthy fats, and vegan protein sources.

meals.breakfast: Tofu scramble with turmeric, peppers, onions, and avocado toast.
meals.lunch: Lentil and vegetable soup served with warm whole-grain pita bread.
meals.dinner: Chickpea curry with coconut milk, spinach, and basmati brown rice.
meals.snacks: Hummus with carrot sticks, and mixed berry smoothie with hemp protein.
